creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
On Sat, Jan 06, 2007 at 07:20:35PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of math/libtommath,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/107627 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

My mistake on this one.  For some reason I sent this from my old
address so it was misfiled as needing maintainers approval.  I do
approve of this since I sent it.  :)

-- WXS
